headline: Swalwell's Dick-aster: 4 Chicks Spill Rape Tea on CA Gov Simp 😩🍆💦
text:
Manhattan DA 🕵️‍♂️🔍 SLAMMING 🚪 the GAVEL ⚖️ on Eric Swalwell's 🧔💼 HORNY HOUSE 🚫🍆 HORROR SHOW! High-profile Dem cuck 🐔📱, Cali Gov race frontrunner 🏃‍♂️🏆, DENIES 😤🚫 FOUR WOMEN'S 🔥 RAPE & HARASS TEA ☕💥 – from SF Chronicle SLAY 📜🔪 spilling deets on ex-staffer getting SOLICITED 😏🍆 and ASSAULTED 🥊🍑 TWICE: Sept 2019 drinks date GONE WILD 🥴🍸 and 2024 NYC gala afterparty BLACKOUT BONING 🚫✅! 'Too drunk to consent' she ROARS 🦁😵 – BBC sniffing but can't verify 🕵️‍♀️❓, while CNN drops QUAD ATTACK 🧨👯‍♀️ of MISCONDUCT MADNESS!

Swalwell's squad 📞📱 GHOSTS BBC 👻📡 but his LAWYERS 💼🛡️ fire CEASE-AND-DESIST CUMSHOTS 📧🚫 at two accusers – meanwhile FB video VLOG 🖥️😢: 'Not a saint 🙏🚫, made mistakes with Wifey 👩‍❤️‍💋‍👨💔 – SORRY BABE 😘 for this clusterf*ck!' Married dad-of-three 🍼🍼🍼 vows 'FACTS WILL SLAY 🗡️📊' and LEGAL COUNTERPUNCH 🥊⚖️ – but ADAM SCHIFF 🚀🕵️‍♂️ and HAKEEM JEFFRIES 👑📢 DUMP his ass 🚮💨 HOURS after drop! Aides HORRIFIED 😱🤮: 'Abhorrent AF 🤢, STAND WITH SURVIVORS 👏🦸‍♀️ – betraying Cali trust like a BAD GOV VIBE CHECK ❌🇺🇸!'

TIMING? PURE NIGHTMARE ⏰😈 – weeks from postal ballots ✉️🗳️ in WIDE-OPEN primary to YEET Gavin Newsom 🏄‍♂️👋! Swalwell was POLL DADDY 🥇📈 but now SPLIT DEM VOTE 💔🔀 risks GOP CUCKBLOCK 🐔🚫 in liberal Cali – Repubs could SNIPE top-two spots 😈🏆 and FREEZE Dems outta November! NYC DA BEGS 'Come forward survivors 📞🆘 – our TRAUMA SQUAD 🏥❤️ gotchu!' while Swalwell SWEATS 😰💦 his '20-year protector of women' glow-up 🛡️👩 CRUMBLES like Epstein list drama 🛌📜! Is this the END of Swalwell's GOV DREAM 🍆🏰 or just FAKE NEWS FAKE-OUT 🤡🚫? Dems in PANIC MODE 📉😱 as frontrunner FUMBLES BALL 🏈💥 – stay tuned for more DICK-UMENTARY 🍆📽️! ‼️💦🔥
